meta.title: Amir Khalili — Full-Stack Developer & Software Engineer

profile.name: Amir Khalili
profile.tagline: I build scalable, resilient systems from the database to the pixel.
profile.bio: I'm a full-stack developer and software engineer who has been writing code professionally since 2019. I specialize in designing distributed, microservice-based architectures and crafting fast, accessible interfaces. From real-time multiplayer games to banking contract platforms, I care about the entire product — performance, reliability, and the small details that make software feel great to use.

milestones.title: Joined SAPO
milestones.description: Started as a back-end game developer building real-time multiplayer systems with Node.js.

milestones.title: Real-Time & Microservices
milestones.description: Dove deep into WebRTC, gRPC, and distributed architecture for live multiplayer games.

milestones.title: Web3 Frontend
milestones.description: Built a cross-chain DEX at First-data (1Dex) with React, GraphQL, and MetaMask integration.

milestones.title: Banking & FinTech
milestones.description: Full-stack work on online contract and digital signature platforms for banking systems at Dotin.

points: Working on online contract and digital signature systems for 7 banking platforms using NestJS and microservices.
Optimized business logic and built a document versioning system.
Designed a Microsoft Word-like text editor with React (medad.me).
Developed a cross-chain decentralized exchange (DEX) with MetaMask, WebSockets, GraphQL, and React.
Designed an atomic transaction system and optimized application performance.
Developed a Werewolf (Mafia) multiplayer game with WebSocket, WebRTC, gRPC, and microservices.
Built 3 custom game scenarios and a 3D model download and encryption service with Node.js.

projects.title: Medad
projects.description: A Microsoft Word-like web editor for creating and editing documents, built for online contract and digital signature platforms. Powers document workflows across banking systems with React, NestJS, Redis, and microservices.

projects.title: API Weaver
projects.description: A CLI tool and TypeScript library that generates type-safe SDKs from OpenAPI specifications — weaving your APIs into ready-to-use clients, models, and enums. Published on npm as @api-weaver/core.

projects.title: NestJS ActiveMQ
projects.description: An open-source NestJS microservice transport provider for Apache ActiveMQ, built on rhea with RxJS-based request/response messaging and message pattern support. Published on npm as @fingercoder/nestjs-activemq.

projects.title: Contract Builder
projects.description: Front-end for an online contract builder platform — document authoring, AI-assisted workflows, and Cursor skills integration for building banking contracts.

projects.title: Keylogger (Course)
projects.description: Educational Python keylogger project — source code from a security course demonstrating input capture mechanics and system-level event handling.
